## 🎟️ Microsoft Certification Voucher Submission

Complete this form after finishing the Copilot Learning Lab exercises.
Vouchers are awarded **first come, first served** — limited quantity available!

---

### Your Information

**Full Name:**
<!-- Your full name as it appears in university records -->


**UNC Email Address:**
<!-- Must be a valid @unc.edu or @cs.unc.edu email -->


**GitHub Username:**
<!-- We'll verify your fork -->


**Forked Repository URL:**
<!-- Paste the URL: https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/UNC-SolHacks-2026 -->


---

### Preferred Certification Exam

<!-- Put an X in ONE box below -->

- [ ] AZ-900: Azure Fundamentals
- [ ] AI-900: Azure AI Fundamentals
- [ ] DP-900: Azure Data Fundamentals
- [ ] SC-900: Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals
- [ ] No preference

---

### Exercises Completed

<!-- Check ALL exercises you completed (minimum 3 required) -->

- [ ] 01 — Autocomplete (completed functions with Copilot)
- [ ] 02 — Writing Tests (wrote tests for Calculator class)
- [ ] 03 — Refactoring (refactored messy code with Copilot)
- [ ] 04 — Documentation (generated docstrings with Copilot)
- [ ] 05 — Debugging (found and fixed all 5 bugs)
- [ ] 06 — Build an API (completed the FastAPI endpoints)
- [ ] Starter Project (built something original)

---

### What was your favorite exercise and why?

<!-- A sentence or two about what you enjoyed or learned -->


### What did you build or modify? (optional)

<!-- If you built something in the Starter Project or extended an exercise, briefly describe it -->


---

### Submission Confirmations

<!-- You MUST check ALL boxes below to qualify -->

- [ ] I am a current UNC student
- [ ] I forked the repository to my own GitHub account
- [ ] I completed at least 3 exercises using GitHub Copilot
- [ ] My forked repo is public so organizers can verify my work
- [ ] I understand vouchers are first come, first served and limited in quantity
